title: Berger Silk Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Berger Silk Store is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!
